name: fresh_queries_2026_07
purpose: Contamination-resistant Layer 3 eval set. SimpleQA is public and answer engines (Perplexity et al.) have plausibly optimized for it; these questions cover events from June-July 2026 (weeks old at build time) with hand-written phrasing never published anywhere, so no model or vendor pipeline can have memorized either the questions or, for post-cutoff models, the answers.
method: Facts mined from the Wikipedia Current Events portals for June and July 2026 plus targeted news/sports/space sources; every load-bearing gold answer cross-checked against at least two independent results at build time (tennis/NBA finals, Long March 10B recovery, Artemis III crew each confirmed by 3+ outlets). Only SETTLED facts included - anything with a drifting answer (ongoing death tolls, live tournaments) was excluded so golds stay stable.
grading: Same fields and protocol as live_queries.jsonl (answers list + answer_type feeds evals/common.py answer_variants; judge fallback unchanged).
caveats: fresh-024 (Moana opening gross) rests on a single primary source; fresh-011/016/017/018/019/020/021/022/023/025/026/027 rest on the Wikipedia current-events portal (curated but single-venue). Regenerate a new vintage before reusing months later - freshness is the point.
